verses.1: “Come down and sit in the dust, virgin daughter of Babylon.
verses.2: Take the millstones and grind flour.
verses.4: Our Redeemer, the LORD of Armies is his name,
verses.5: “Sit in silence, and go into darkness,
verses.6: I was angry with my people.
verses.7: You said, ‘I will be a princess forever,’
verses.8: “Now therefore hear this, you who are given to pleasures,
verses.9: But these two things will come to you in a moment in one day:
verses.10: For you have trusted in your wickedness.
verses.11: Therefore disaster will come on you.
verses.13: You are wearied in the multitude of your counsels.
verses.15: The things that you labored in will be like this:
